text:
よう！
さっそく町の散策か？

ここは気のいい連中ばっかりだからよ。
すぐになじめると思うぜ！

あ、そうだ……俺、今夜は
朝まで見張り番なんだった。

Heya!
Out for a stroll around town already, are we?
Everyone here's really nice, so you'll be feeling at home in no time.
Ah, that's right... Almost forgot I'll be on watch all night tonight.
Guess I'll go catch a few winks while I can.
